mapper.select: select count(*) from members where email = #{email}
select count(*) from members where phone = #{phone}
mapper.insert: insert into auth_codes ( member_id, target_type, target_value, purpose, code_hash, expires_at, attempt_count ) values ( #{memberId}, #{targetType}, #{targetValue}, #{purpose}, #{codeHash}, #{expiresAt}, #{attemptCount} )
mapper.select: select auth_code_id, code_hash, expires_at, verified_at, used_at, attempt_count, created_at from auth_codes where target_type = #{targetType} and target_value = #{targetValue} and purpose = #{purpose} and used_at is null order by created_at desc limit 1
mapper.update: update auth_codes set verified_at = now(6), attempt_count = 0 where auth_code_id = #{authCodeId}
